title: RP2040 CAN node benchmark fixture
representative_intent: RP2040 3.3V CAN bus controller node with USB debug

requirements.text: Represent RP2040 USB debug/programming connectivity with 3.3 V logic-rail evidence.
Connect CAN controller/transceiver nets with CANH/CANL, termination and protection evidence.
Provide power-tree evidence for RP2040 logic, CAN transceiver supply and decoupling coverage.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, current-density, and SI/PI review evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not CAN compliance or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim EMC, CAN physical-layer compliance, surge robustness, manufacturability, or production readiness.
